executive_summary: Build workflow execution failed due to missing GitHub Actions workflow file. The workflow dispatch endpoint returned HTTP 404, indicating that the .github/workflows/build.yml file does not exist in the repository or is not accessible. This is a critical configuration error that prevents any build automation from executing.

errors.title: GitHub Actions Workflow File Not Found
errors.description: The GitHub Actions workflow dispatch API returned HTTP 404 Not Found when attempting to trigger the build.yml workflow. This indicates that the workflow file .github/workflows/build.yml does not exist in the repository at the specified branch, or GitHub Actions is disabled for this repository.
errors.error_message: HTTP Error 404: Not Found. Workflow dispatch endpoint returned 404. Possible causes: token missing workflow/actions permissions, workflow not accessible on this repo/branch, or Actions disabled. dispatch_url=https://api.github.com/repos/loginkarun/scib_demo/actions/workflows/.github%2Fworkflows%2Fbuild.yml/dispatches response_body={"message":"Not Found","documentation_url":"https://docs.github.com/rest/actions/workflows#create-a-workflow-dispatch-event","status":"404"}
errors.root_cause: The workflow file .github/workflows/build.yml is missing from the repository structure. The GitHub Actions workflow dispatch API cannot find the specified workflow file to execute.
errors.impact: Complete build automation failure. No builds can be triggered or executed until the workflow file is created and properly configured. This blocks all CI/CD operations including compilation, testing, and deployment.

errors.title: Missing GitHub Actions Workflow Configuration
errors.description: The repository lacks the required .github/workflows directory structure and build.yml workflow definition. This prevents automated build execution through GitHub Actions.
errors.error_message: Workflow file not found - Final attempt failure
errors.root_cause: The .github/workflows directory may not exist, or the build.yml file has not been created within it. GitHub Actions requires this specific directory structure to discover and execute workflows.
errors.impact: No automated CI/CD pipeline available. Manual intervention required to create workflow configuration before any automated builds can proceed.

recommended_fixes.description: Create the .github/workflows/build.yml file with proper Maven build configuration
fix_steps: Create .github/workflows directory if it doesn't exist
Create build.yml file with Maven build job definition
Define build steps: checkout, setup-java, maven build, test execution
Commit and push the workflow file to the repository

recommended_fixes.description: Ensure GitHub Actions is enabled for the repository and the access token has proper permissions
fix_steps: Navigate to repository Settings > Actions > General
Verify Actions permissions are set to 'Allow all actions'
Check that workflow permissions allow read and write access
Verify the GitHub token has 'workflow' scope enabled

compliance_notes.audit_trail: Build failure detected at attempt 3. No workflow execution occurred due to missing workflow file. Error classification completed and documented.
compliance_notes.next_steps: Create .github/workflows/build.yml file with Maven build configuration before attempting next build.
